author: w3Lb
content: Plan: change run() -> Result<(), i32> so mode functions' results propagate naturally (drops result_to_code adapter). Extract read_stdin_bytes()/read_stdin_string() helpers returning Result<_, i32> that print the error and yield Err(1), replacing the three unwrap_or_else closures that called process::exit(1) (main.rs:51,67,104). process::exit remains only in main(), after run() returns — RAII destructors in all mode code now run before exit. Verify with cargo test --workspace + clippy.
